title: Wikki Ai assitant
description: Smart ai chat that talks only about minecraft in minecraft
body:
## 🌌 **Wikki — AI**
> **Chat with Google Gemini right inside your Minecraft world!**  
> Type your questions, get smart answers, and explore creativity — *without ever leaving the game.*

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6ZtUkz1nwKQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### 🚀 **Setup Guide (Free to Use!)**

1. Visit [**Google AI Studio**](https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey)  
2. **Log in** with your Google account  
3. Click **“Create API Key”**  
4. **Select or create** a Google Cloud project  
5. **Copy** the API key  
6. In Minecraft, press **`G`** to open the configuration menu  
7. **Paste** your API key and choose your **Gemini model**  
8. Done ✅ — start chatting with AI right inside Minecraft!

---

### 🧩 **Requirements**
- 🧱 Fabric Loader `>= 0.17.3`
- ⚙️ Fabric API `>= 0.135.0`
- ☕ Java 17+

---
